description_long: This is a modern digital wristwatch with a round black case and a matching black strap. The watch face features a large, easy-to-read digital display with oversized numerals in gray and green, showing the time, date, step count, heart rate, and day of the week. The strap is made of a flexible material, likely silicone or rubber, and is secured with a silver buckle. The watch case appears to be constructed from a matte black plastic or composite material, with a smooth, slightly curved profile. There are no visible brand logos or decorative elements on the case or strap, giving it a minimalist and functional appearance. The overall design is sporty and suitable for everyday urban use.
description: A sleek, black digital wristwatch with a round face, large green and gray numerals, and a black silicone strap with a silver buckle. The display shows time, date, step count, and heart rate, emphasizing a sporty, minimalist style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round digital display with large green and gray numerals, step count, heart rate, date, and day of the week.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the black case and the curvature of the strap, with the silver buckle partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the watch case, the strap's adjustment holes, and the full silver buckle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the case profile and strap curvature, with the buckle and adjustment holes visible.
attribute_dial_design: The dial features a minimalist digital layout with oversized numerals in gray and green, displaying hours, minutes, step count, heart rate, date, and day of the week. There are no subdials, indices, or decorative patterns, emphasizing clarity and functionality.
attribute_strap_type: Black silicone or rubber strap with a smooth finish and multiple adjustment holes.
attribute_watch_face_display: Digital display with large, segmented numerals and icons for time, date, step count, and heart rate. No analog hands or hybrid elements.
